title: Polling Underway Smoothly Across Karur District
summary: Voting commenced across Karur with officials reporting a smooth start. Polling booths opened on time with EVMs functioning properly, and arrangements ensured orderly queues and accessibility for all voters.

title: Authorities Continue Strict Monitoring During Voting
summary: Flying squads and surveillance teams remained active throughout polling day, monitoring for illegal cash distribution and ensuring compliance with election rules.

title: Leaders Urge Peaceful Voting in Karur
summary: Political leaders appealed to voters to maintain calm and participate peacefully as polling progressed across the district.

title: Tight Security Ensures Peaceful Polling
summary: Heavy police deployment and security arrangements helped maintain law and order across sensitive areas during voting.

title: Transport Services Facilitate Voter Movement
summary: Public and private transport services operated efficiently, enabling voters and polling staff to travel without disruptions.

title: Medical Teams Assist Voters Amid Heat
summary: Healthcare teams provided assistance to voters facing heat-related issues, with ambulances stationed near polling booths.

title: Hot Weather Affects Voter Turnout Patterns
summary: High temperatures influenced voter turnout, with increased participation observed during morning and evening hours.

title: Voters Turn Out in Large Numbers
summary: Residents across Karur actively participated in voting, with long queues seen at several polling stations.

title: EVMs Function Smoothly During Polling
summary: Election officials confirmed that EVMs and VVPAT units operated without major issues during voting.

title: Minor Violations Reported During Polling
summary: Authorities reported a few minor election violations, with prompt action taken to maintain order.

title: Continuous Patrols Conducted Across District
